Peng Hu еҪӯиҷҺ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Peng Hu (еҪӯиҷҺ). In the 200s in the Poyang region, raised ten thousand men under his control, fled on sight of Wu forces.
